final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original infographic trifold brochure for a 4-day 3-night Hangzhou tourism itinerary, floating above a cardstock surface, with a real Hangzhou city map as the background thread.

Style/medium: flat editorial illustration with photorealistic landmark insets, trifold printed brochure design, clean travel-guide layout inspired by high-end tourism publishing
Composition: three-panel trifold spread laid open and slightly angled, floating above a light cardstock surface casting a soft drop shadow; real Hangzhou street map fills the background of all three panels as a semi-transparent base layer; each panel contains a distinct day's route with landmark icons pinned to map positions
Subject: 4-day 3-night Hangzhou itinerary brochure — Day 1 panel: 断桥残雪, 白堤, 孤山, 曲院风荷, 苏堤春晓, 花港观鱼, 雷峰塔, 柳浪闻莺 along West Lake; Day 2 panel: 灵隐寺, 飞来峰造像, 法喜寺, 宋城; Day 3 panel: 九溪十八涧, 龙井村, 十里琅珰, 云栖竹径; Day 4 panel split into 方案A (拱宸桥, 桥西历史街区) and 方案B (西溪湿地); each landmark rendered as a small characteristic illustrated icon with a location pin
Scene/backdrop: brochure floats above a warm off-white cardstock surface; background of brochure panels shows a muted, desaturated real Hangzhou city map with West Lake clearly visible as the geographic anchor
Lighting/mood: soft diffused overhead light on the cardstock surface, gentle shadow beneath the floating brochure, warm and inviting travel-guide atmosphere
Color palette: West Lake celadon green and ink blue as dominant brand colors, warm cream for panel backgrounds, terracotta red for Day route accent lines, gold for landmark pin icons — all against the muted grey map underlay
Materials/textures: matte coated paper texture on brochure panels, slight emboss on landmark icons, visible paper edge on the trifold fold lines, smooth cardstock surface below
Text (verbatim): "杭州4天3晚旅游攻略" as brochure title; day labels "第一天：西湖经典游" / "第二天：禅意杭州" / "第三天：九溪烟树徒步" / "第四天：文艺收官"; landmark names 断桥残雪, 雷峰塔, 灵隐寺, 飞来峰, 法喜寺, 宋城, 九溪十八涧, 龙井村, 云栖竹径, 西溪湿地 as pin labels on map
Constraints: trifold must be legible as a physical printed object; West Lake must be geographically recognizable on the map layer; landmark icons must carry visual identity (pagoda silhouette for 雷峰塔, temple gate for 灵隐寺, bamboo grove for 云栖竹径, tea fields for 龙井村); brochure floats with visible depth above cardstock
Avoid: generic flat tourist poster without map context; distorted map geography; overcrowded illegible text; neon or nightclub color palette; 3D render plastic look; watermark
